title: thelypteris scalaris
intro: Thelypteris scalaris, also known as the Vase Fern or Vase-shouldered Shield Fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris scalaris include reducing fever, relieving cough, and treating respiratory problems, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Thelypteris scalaris can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
